get.description:
Get currency by key and value for "currencyId".

Always returns one currency.

Get all currencies.

Returns a list of all currencies.

post.description:
Create one or a list of currencies.

Returns the created currency or list of currencies.

put.description:
Update a currency by key and value for "currencyId".

Returns the updated currency.

delete.description:
Delete a currency by key and value for "currencyId".

Returns a message indicating the currency was deleted.
Always deletes one currency.

get.description:
Get the latest currencyId, returns 1 if table is empty

Can only be used safely on an empty table or directly after an insertion.
Returns a list of the latest currencies, which all share the same `createdHoursSinceLaunch` as defined by `latest_hour` endpoint.

post.description: Returns a list of currencies that match any of the queries

get.description:
Get item base type by key and value for "itemBaseTypeId".

Always returns one item base type.

Get all item base types.

Returns a list of all item base types.

schema.title: Response Itembasetypes-Get All Item Base Types

post.description:
Create one or a list of new item base types.

Returns the created item base type or list of item base types.

put.description:
Update an item base type by key and value for "itemBaseTypeId".

Returns the updated item base type.

delete.description:
Delete an item base type by key and value for "itemBaseTypeId".

Returns a message that the item base type was deleted successfully.
Always deletes one item base type.

get.description:
Get all item modifiers.

Returns a list of all item modifiers.

post.description:
Create one or a list item modifiers.

Returns the created item modifier or list of item modifiers.

get.description:
Get the latest "itemId"

Can only be used safely on an empty table or directly after an insertion.

Get all items.

Returns a list of all items.

post.description:
Create one or a list of new items.

Returns the created item or list of items.

get.description:
Get league by key and value for "leagueId".

Always returns one league.

put.description:
Update a league by key and value for "leagueId"

Returns the updated league.

get.description:
Get all leagues.

Returns a list of all leagues.

post.description:
Create one or a list of new leagues.

Returns the created league or list of leagues.

get.description:
Get leagues that are still valid/active

Always returns a list, but it may be empty.

Get the latest "itemId"

Can only be used safely on an empty table or directly after an insertion.

Get all items.

Returns a list of all items.

post.description:
Create one or a list of new items.

Returns the created item or list of items.

get.description:
Get the non aggregated unidentified items for the last 10 recorded hours
    (not necessarily the last 10 hours)

post.description:
Deletes the non aggregated unidentified items for the last 10 recorded hours
    (not necessarily the last 10 hours)
And inserts the new items

get.description:
Get modifier or list of modifiers by key and
value for "modifierId"

Dominant key is "modifierId".

Returns one or a list of modifiers.

Get all modifiers.

Returns a list of all modifiers.

post.description:
Create one or a list of new modifiers.

Returns the created modifier or list of modifiers.

put.description:
Update a modifier by key and value for "modifierId" and "position"

Returns the updated modifier.

delete.description:
Delete a modifier by key and value for "modifierId"

Returns a message that the modifier was deleted.
Always deletes one modifier.

get.description:
Get all grouped modifiers by effect.

Returns a list of all grouped modifiers by effect.

schema.title: Response Modifiers-Get Grouped Modifier By Effect

post.description:
Takes a query based on the 'PlotQuery' schema and retrieves data
to be used for plotting in the format of the 'PlotData' schema.

The 'PlotQuery' schema allows for modifier restriction and item specifications.

Takes a query based on the 'TurnstileQuery' schema and retrieves data
based on the cloudfare challenge turnstile validation response.

Args:
    query (schemas.TurnstileQuery): Query based on the 'TurnstileQuery' schema.
    verification (bool, optional): Verification flag. Defaults to Depends(verification).

Raises:
    HTTPException: If verification fails.

Returns:
    _type_: Returns a response based on the 'TurnstileResponse' schema.

Can only be used in `settings.ENVIRONMENT=local` environment.

Test route for bulk inserting records.

Returns a success message once the insertion is complete.

Can only be used in `settings.ENVIRONMENT=local` environment.

Test route for bulk inserting users and verifying them.

Returns the access tokens for the created users.

schema.title: Response Tests-Bulk Insert Users And Verify

PlotQuery.title: PlotQuery
PlotQuery.description: Plots for items with or without modifiers
